messages.author: zoe
messages.text: Profile reads are our hot path, but I do not want stale permissions for half a day.

messages.author: maya
messages.text: Lets cache Supabase profile lookups in Redis for five minutes and invalidate after a role change.

messages.author: liam
messages.text: Five minutes is acceptable. Later we can publish invalidations through Kafka if TTLs become a problem.
